title: tigridia minuta
intro: Tigridia minuta, also known as the Mexican daffodil or dwarf tiger flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic. Tigridia minuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
